content: Maria, who has just been appointed as National Coordinator against violent extremism, participated in a demonstration in which the Elbonian flag was ritually burned.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by danepo (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ita:Maria, che è appena stata nominata Coordinatrice Nazionale contro l'estremismo violento, ha partecipato a una manifestaz
